## CloudEye/DarkEye

CloudEyE, an evolved version of DarkEyE, allows threat actors to use different types of malware of their choice and make it undetectable to anti-virus solutions. This program is being sold by legitimate Italian company which markets it as a tool for developers that want to protect their program from piracy and reverse engineering. The tutorials published and forum posts about CloudEyE prove that the objective of the program is to aid malicious activities.

* * *
